title: agrostis gigantea
intro: Agrostis gigantea, also known as redtop or giant redtop, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Agrostis gigantea include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Agrostis gigantea is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of a tincture or salve to harness its medicinal properties.
